summary: Frontend testing completed for Dashboard with recharts. All requested features (KPIs, charts, scope cards, dark mode) are working correctly. Minor issue: fiscal year selector only shows 'Exercice actuel' option.

integration_issues.flow: Fiscal year selector in scope breakdown chart
integration_issues.issue: Dropdown only shows 'Exercice actuel' option, other fiscal years not populated
affected_selectors: select in Répartition par scope section
integration_issues.root_cause: FiscalYearContext doesn't refresh fiscalYears after login - useEffect only runs once on mount

action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix FiscalYearContext to refresh fiscal years after login (add dependency on auth token or trigger refresh from AuthContext)
critical_code_review_comments: FiscalYearContext.js line 36-44: useEffect only checks token on mount, doesn't re-fetch when user logs in. Consider adding a refresh mechanism or listening to auth state changes.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all features working, minor fiscal year selector issue)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard with recharts is fully functional. KPIs show current emissions (0 for current fiscal year 2029 as activities don't have fiscal_year_id). Scope cards show global data (2180.32 tCO2e for Scope 1, 468.04 tCO2e for Scope 3 Amont). Dark mode works correctly with proper chart styling.

details: Émissions totales - Shows 0 kgCO2e (current fiscal year has no activities)
Variation N-1 - Shows 0% (no previous year data)
Par employé - Shows '-' with '4 employés' subtitle
Exercice actuel - Shows '2029' with '5 exercice(s) enregistré(s)'
Title: 'Évolution des émissions par exercice'
Stacked bar chart with years 2024, 2025, 2027, 2028, 2029
Legend shows: Scope 1, Scope 2, Scope 3 Amont, Scope 3 Aval
All bars show 0t as activities don't have fiscal_year_id
Title: 'Répartition par scope'
Horizontal bar chart with Scope 1, Scope 2, Scope 3 Amont, Scope 3 Aval
Fiscal year selector present (shows 'Exercice actuel')
Drill-down hint: 'Cliquez sur une barre pour voir le détail par catégorie'
All bars show 0t for current fiscal year
Scope 1 - 2180,32 tCO2e, 2/4 catégories, 50%
Scope 2 - 0 kgCO2e, 0/3 catégories, 0%
Scope 3 - Amont - 468,04 tCO2e, 1/8 catégories, 12%
Scope 3 - Aval - 0 kgCO2e, 0/7 catégories, 0%
All cards have progress bars with correct percentages
Theme toggle button works correctly
Main area background: rgb(15, 23, 42) (slate-900)
Charts adapt to dark mode with proper grid lines
KPI cards and scope cards have dark backgrounds
Text contrast is good in dark mode

/api/dashboard/fiscal-comparison.response_sample: Array of 5 fiscal years (2024-2029) with scope breakdowns
